---
title: "Schedule"
toc: false
date: ""
sidebar: false
format:
  html:
    number-sections: false
execute:
  freeze: false
---

:::{.contents-table .column-body-outset}

|Topic              |Instructor  |Links                                                                    |
|-------------------|------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|[30-Mar-2026 (Mon)]{.badge .badge-secondary} ||                                                           |
|Minimal demo       |John Doe   |[Slides](slides/sample/index.html), [Report](reports/sample/index.html)   |
|Using custom theme |John Doe   |[Report](reports/usage/index.html)                                        |
|Quarto basics      |John Doe   |[Report](reports/demo/index.html)                                         |
|Quarto and R       |John Doe   |[Slides](slides/demo/index.html), [Report](reports/demo-with-r/index.html)|
|OJS and mermaid    |John Doe   |[Report](reports/more/index.html)                                         |

:::
